from abc import ABC, abstractmethod
import boto3
import json
from datetime import datetime


class NotificationChannel(ABC):
    @abstractmethod
    def send(self, recipient: str, message: str) -> bool: ...

    @abstractmethod
    def validate_recipient(self, recipient: str) -> bool: ...


class SMSNotificationChannel(NotificationChannel):
    def __init__(self, provider_key: str, region: str = "us-east-1"):
        self.client = boto3.client("sns", region_name=region, aws_access_key_id=provider_key)
        self.region = region
        self._rate_limit = 100
        self._sent_count = 0

    def send(self, recipient: str, message: str) -> bool:
        if not self.validate_recipient(recipient):
            return False
        truncated = message[:160]
        response = self.client.publish(PhoneNumber=recipient, Message=truncated)
        self._sent_count += 1
        return response["ResponseMetadata"]["HTTPStatusCode"] == 200

    def validate_recipient(self, recipient: str) -> bool:
        return recipient.startswith("+") and len(recipient) >= 10

    def get_delivery_status(self, message_id: str) -> dict:
        return self.client.get_sms_attributes(message_id=message_id)

    def _format_for_region(self, message: str) -> str:
        if self.region == "eu-west-1":
            return message[:140]
        return message
